supportLevel: Unofficial public Microsoft Fabric status mirror based on HTML scraping

active.detailsHtml: Fabric customers using the Teams mobile app may experience issues loading reports within the app. Engineers are investigating the issue and updates will be provided soon. As a workaround, customers may open the reports in a browser.
active.detailsText: Fabric customers using the Teams mobile app may experience issues loading reports within the app. Engineers are investigating the issue and updates will be provided soon. As a workaround, customers may open the reports in a browser.
